steps.t: You found an abandoned waggon with phials of a familiar substance. This could be the mode of transport Indagir used. You should search the waggon to s…
This seems like the same substance you encountered in Thaurisgar. There is a trail of broken phials. You should follow the trail leading into Tumladen…
The bile spills seem to follow the road into Tumladen.
The bile spills seem to follow the road into Tumladen.
The bile spills have led to Tumladen and keep going further into town.
The trail is getting shorter and shorter and must end soon.
The trail seems to have led to a dead end.
The trail of spilled substance has led you to an injured waggon driver.
